## Z2 Endurance

Easy aerobic ride. Stay strictly in Z2; if HR drifts high
in the second half, ease off rather than push through.

```fit-workout
- 10m Z1
- 60m Z2
- 5m Z1
```

## Mobility

```fit-workout
- 20m mobility flow
```
